footer.tagline: Short stays in exclusive properties, run directly by Park Lofts, the developer behind the best known buildings in Asuncion.

listing.description: Exclusive properties operated directly by Park Lofts. Book with USD pricing and pay online.
listing.errorFallback: We could not load the properties

empty.title: No results
empty.body: Adjust your filters or try different dates. Every property is operated directly by Park Lofts.

unitDetail.notFoundBody: The property you are looking for is no longer listed.
unitDetail.aboutFallback: Welcome. A space designed for short stays with no middlemen.

location.fallbackError: We could not load the map. Use the button to open Google Maps.
location.fallbackNoCoords: Open the exact location in Google Maps.

reservationCard.notCharged: You will not be charged yet
reservationCard.maxGuestsNotice: This place has a maximum of {{count}} guests, not counting infants.

step2.title: Review and pay
step2.methodDesc: Secure credit or debit card payment.
step2.legal: By confirming, you agree to the {{rules}}, {{safety}}, and {{cancellation}}.

errors.createFailed: Failed to process booking. Please try again.
errors.missingProcessId: Could not start payment. Contact the team.

payment.errorTitle: We could not find the booking
payment.emailNotice: We sent you an email with the full details. Our team will contact you before check-in with the arrival instructions and any request you would like to coordinate.
payment.emailNoticeHeld: We placed a hold on your card while we verify availability with the host. No charge has been made. You will receive an email as soon as we confirm the booking or release the hold.
payment.holdNote: Temporary authorization hold via Bancard. The charge only lands once we confirm the booking. If we release the hold you will see the amount return to your card within 24 to 72 hours.
payment.secureProcessed: Payment processed securely through Bancard. You will receive the receipt by email along with your booking details.

nextSteps.01Body: We sent you the receipt and your booking details. If you do not see it in your inbox, check spam or promotions.
nextSteps.02Body: The day before check-in you will receive exact arrival instructions, wifi access and direct host contact.
nextSteps.03Body: If you need to adjust dates or have a special request, write to us before check-in and we will coordinate.

payment.cancelledBody: The payment was not completed. Close this window and try again.

contact.heading: Let us talk
contact.intro: We are available to coordinate your stay, solve questions and handle special requests. Write us through your preferred channel and we respond in under an hour during business hours.

cta.title: Pick your property and book in minutes
cta.body: Our system processes secure Bancard payments and confirms availability instantly.

datePicker.subtitle: Check-in and check-out to view availability
datePicker.crossBlocked: Those dates cross an unavailable range. Pick shorter dates.

meta.title: Park Lofts Paraguay | Book
meta.description: Premium bookings at Park Lofts Paraguay. Exclusive properties in Asuncion with hotel-style service.
